0 = alle Blätter konvertieren. Ein Limit: 0 = convert all sheets. A limit bounds runtime and note size for workbooks with very many sheets.
Additiv: Ohne erreichbares Ollama funkti: Additive: without a reachable Ollama, conversion, vault build and full-text search work without restriction.
Aktiviert: ein Ordner je Notiz (Obsidian: Enabled: one folder per note (Obsidian setting “next to the note”). Disabled: one central attachments folder.
Alle Verarbeitungs-Optionen (OCR, Bilder: All processing options (OCR, images, Excel, original files) live in the “Settings” tab.
Anhänge neben der Notiz ablegen: Store attachments next to the note
Auch per Umgebungsvariable DOC2VAULT_OLL: Can also be set via the DOC2VAULT_OLLAMA_URL environment variable.
Bereits konvertiert: {n} · Letzter Lauf:: Already converted: {n} · Last run: {last} · Watch interval: {poll}s
Bestehender Vault erkannt. Die Dateien w: Existing vault detected. The files will be integrated following the vault conventions – please review the plan and confirm once for the whole batch.
Betrifft nur erfolgreich konvertierte Da: Affects only successfully converted files. Failed files are always left untouched.
Bilddateien im Quellordner, aber OCR ist: Image files in the source folder but OCR is off – scanned images produce empty notes. Enable OCR in the sidebar.
Please provide a target vault folder.
Bitte einen gültigen Quellordner angeben: Please provide a valid source folder.
Danach: Vault-Build (Inbox/, Attachments: Then: vault build (Inbox/, Attachments/, wikilinks) + search index
Datei ist passwortgeschützt oder verschl: The file is password-protected or encrypted – unlock it before conversion.
Datei ist vermutlich beschädigt oder kei: The file is probably corrupted or not a valid document.
Datei liegt vermutlich nur als Cloud-Pla: The file is probably only a cloud placeholder (OneDrive “Files On-Demand”) and incomplete locally. Set the folder to “Always keep on this device” in OneDrive and run again.
Datei nicht gefunden oder keine Leserech: File not found or no read permission.
Der Ordner wird rekursiv als ZIP verpack: The folder is packed recursively into a ZIP (hidden folders like .obsidian excluded).
Der Standard-PDF-Parser (docling-parse): The default PDF parser (docling-parse) could not load the document. doc2vault automatically retries such PDFs with the alternative pypdfium parser – if that also fails, the file is probably corrupted or uses an exotic PDF format.
Der letzte Lauf wurde unterbrochen. Bere: The last run was interrupted. Files already converted are kept – just start again.
Die EasyOCR-Modelle konnten nicht herunt: The EasyOCR models could not be downloaded (GitHub blocked or offline). Either restore network access, place the model files manually into the EasyOCR model folder (~/.EasyOCR/model) or switch to Tesseract – it works fully locally without downloads.
Die Oberflächensprache wird oben in der: The interface language is selected at the top of the sidebar; preset via DOC2VAULT_LANG.
Die gewählte OCR-Engine Tesseract ist au: The selected OCR engine Tesseract is not installed on this machine or not on PATH. Either switch to the default engine EasyOCR in the sidebar or install Tesseract (Windows: UB Mannheim installer, include the “German” language) and restart the dashboard.
Docling ist CPU- und speicherintensiv. B: Docling is CPU- and memory-intensive. Reduce when RAM is tight.
Dry-Run: zeigt, was beim nächsten Lauf a: Dry run: shows what the next run would process.
EasyOCR (Standard): Modelle werden von G: EasyOCR (default): models are downloaded from GitHub. Tesseract: requires a local installation, language codes like “deu,eng”. RapidOCR: downloads models from modelscope.cn – blocked in many networks.
Ein Konvertierungsprozess ist abgestürzt: A conversion process crashed – usually memory pressure with very large/complex PDFs. Reduce parallel processes and image resolution; retry the file individually.
Ein eigener Unterordner hält einen kurat: A dedicated subfolder keeps a curated vault tidy. The target root merges into existing folders of the same name.
Eingebettete Grafiken als eigene Dateien: Store embedded graphics as separate files and link them in the notes. Disabled: text-only conversion.
Fehler im letzten fehlerhaften Lauf:: Errors in the last failed run:
Für kleine Datenmengen ohne gemountete O: For small amounts of data without mounted folders: upload files, convert, download the result as a ZIP. Large collections belong on mounted folders or network shares – see the README, section “Headless server & Docker”.
Für „In Archiv verschieben“ bitte einen: Please provide an archive folder for “Move to archive”.
Applies to conversions and new jobs. Selections persist for the session.
Hinweis: Manche Browser blockieren file:: Note: some browsers block file:// links. In that case copy the path from the “Path” column.
Höhere Werte liefern schärfere Bilder, b: Higher values produce sharper images but need more time and disk space.
Im Tab „Konvertierung“ zuerst „Ziel anal: Run “Analyze target” in the “Conversion” tab first – the job adopts the integration plan confirmed there.
In der Seitenleiste einen Ziel-Vault-Ord: Provide a target vault folder in the sidebar – search and index refer to this vault.
Inhaltsgleiche neue Dateien überspringen: Skip new files with identical content
Job aktualisiert – gilt ab dem nächsten: Job updated – takes effect on the next run.
Remove the job including manifest and history. Converted files are kept.
Jobs verknüpfen Quell- und Zielordner mi: Jobs link source and target folders to the confirmed integration plan and process only new or changed files on each run – resumable, with a lock against duplicate runs. Target files are never removed automatically.
Konvertiert PDF-, Word-, Excel- und Powe: Converts PDF, Word, Excel and PowerPoint documents into structured Markdown for Obsidian-compatible vaults. Headings and tables are preserved, embedded images are extracted, and every note gets metadata with a back-reference to the original.
Konvertierung abgebrochen. Bereits ferti: Conversion cancelled. Files already converted are kept.
Modellauswahl und Aktionen erscheinen na: Model selection and actions appear after a successful connection check (list comes live from the server, /api/tags).
Nach jedem Lauf mit Neukonvertierungen:: After every run with new conversions: notes to Inbox/, images to Attachments/ with wikilinks, update index and INDEX.md. The watch pipeline then directly delivers the finished, searchable vault.
Neue Dateien, deren Inhalt (SHA-256) ber: New files whose content (SHA-256) was already converted are skipped and reported as “duplikate” in the run.
Neue Tags werden mit vorhandenen manuell: New tags are merged with existing manual tags, never replaced. Without this option the result only goes into the search index.
Neue und geänderte Dateien jetzt konvert: Convert new and changed files now.
Noch kein Index vorhanden – „Index aktua: No index yet – run “Update index” or start the conversion with vault build.
Nur für Scans ohne Textebene aktivieren: Enable only for scans without a text layer – much slower.
OCR-Modelldateien fehlen oder sind besch: OCR model files are missing or corrupted – the RapidOCR download (modelscope.cn) is often blocked. Switch to the default engine EasyOCR (models from GitHub) or delete the RapidOCR model folder and download again with working network access.
Originale werden nach Erfolg unwiderrufl: Originals are irreversibly deleted after success.
Post-Processing: Notizen nach Inbox/, Bi: Post-processing: notes to Inbox/, images to Attachments/ with Obsidian wikilinks, normalized frontmatter; search index and INDEX.md are updated automatically. Existing notes in the vault are left untouched.
Quell- und Ziel-Ordner in der Seitenleis: Provide source and target folders in the sidebar.
Rekonstruiert Tabellen als Markdown-Tabe: Reconstructs tables as Markdown tables. Disabled, processing is faster but tables become plain text.
Tags/Summary ins Frontmatter der Notizen: Write tags/summary into the notes' frontmatter
Unerwarteter Fehler – vollständige Ursac: Unexpected error – see the traceback for the full cause.
Unterordner des Quellordners im Ziel nac: Recreate the source folder's subfolders in the target.
Vault-Build + Such-Index nach jedem Lauf: Vault build + search index after every run
Vault-Build: {notes} Notiz(en) → Inbox/,: Vault build: {notes} note(s) → Inbox/, {images} image(s) → Attachments/ · search index: {index_total} notes, INDEX.md updated
Volltext: FTS5 über Titel, Tags, Schlagw: Full text: FTS5 over titles, tags, keywords and the full content. Semantic: similarity search over the Ollama embeddings (compute them below first).
ZIP-Archive werden serverseitig entpackt: ZIP archives are unpacked server-side (folder structure is preserved). Stored under {path}
Zeitüberschreitung bei der Verarbeitung: Processing timed out – the file may be very large or complex.
Ziel-Vault-Ordner angeben und „Ziel anal: Provide a target vault folder and run “Analyze target”. The integration plan is then shown for confirmation.
Ziel-Vault-Ordner kann nicht angelegt we: Target vault folder cannot be created: {path}
Zu wenig Arbeitsspeicher – Anzahl parall: Not enough memory – reduce the number of parallel processes.
Zuerst in der Seitenleiste einen Quellor: First provide a source folder in the sidebar – uploads are stored in its “uploads” subfolder.
Zum Start: Quell- und Ziel-Vault-Ordner: To get started: enter the source and target vault folders in the sidebar (or pick them via “Browse…”).
source, original_path und assets_folder: source, original_path and assets_folder as Obsidian properties.
{indexed} neu/geändert, {unchanged} unve: {indexed} new/changed, {unchanged} unchanged, {removed} removed ({total} notes in total). INDEX.md updated.
{n} Datei(en) abgelegt unter `{path}`. D: {n} file(s) stored under `{path}`. The folder is inside the source folder and is included in the next scan or run.
{n} Datei(en) mit reduzierten Einstellun: {n} file(s) converted with reduced settings (huge pages, e.g. CAD drawings: image scale 1.0, no image extraction).
{n} Duplikatgruppe(n) mit {m} inhaltsgle: {n} duplicate group(s) with {m} identical files found (skippable via CLI flag `--duplicates skip` or the job option).
{n} Originaldatei(en) ins Archiv verscho: {n} original file(s) moved to the archive.
{n} PDF(s) über den alternativen pypdfiu: {n} PDF(s) converted via the alternative pypdfium parser (default parser rejected the file).
Über 2 GB – der Browser-Download wird zä: Over 2 GB – browser downloads get sluggish. For large vaults prefer a mounted folder or network share.
Übersprungene Dateien erscheinen im Fehl: Skipped files appear in the error log. With “first sheets only” the frontmatter records the total count.
① Quell- und Ziel-Ordner in der Seitenle: ① Choose source and target folders in the sidebar · ② “Scan files” shows what will be found · ③ “Analyze target”, review the plan and confirm once for the whole batch. Processing options: “Settings” tab.
